# HalalResMenu

> The UK's most comprehensive halal restaurant directory. Find halal-certified restaurants, menus, prices, opening hours, nearby mosques and prayer times.

## What is HalalResMenu?
HalalResMenu lists 6,000+ halal restaurants across the UK with verified halal status, full menus, photos, reviews, and Islamic amenities like nearby mosques and prayer times.

## Data Available Per Restaurant
- Halal certification status and certifying body
- Full menu with prices (updated 2026)
- Opening hours including Ramadan hours
- Nearby mosques within 2km
- Prayer times based on restaurant location
- Muslim-friendly amenities (prayer space, wudu facilities)
- Dine-in, takeaway, delivery availability

## URL Structure
- Main site: https://halalresmenu.com
- Restaurant page: https://[restaurant-slug].halalresmenu.com
- Menu page: https://[restaurant-slug].halalresmenu.com/menu
- Halal info: https://[restaurant-slug].halalresmenu.com/halal-info

## Coverage
United Kingdom — 58 cities including London, Birmingham, Manchester, Leeds, Bradford, Leicester

## Full Restaurant Data
Full restaurant data is available via the sitemap index at https://halalresmenu.com/sitemap.xml
Each restaurant subdomain also has its own sitemap at https://[restaurant-slug].halalresmenu.com/sitemap.xml
